name: Booster Shield
description: Booster shields, most commonly made by Dahl, can spawn shield booster pickups when you take damage. Collecting one restores part of your shield, which helps keep you topped up during longer fights where steady incoming fire keeps boosters dropping.
notes: Boosters are temporary and shrink before vanishing, so you need to move quickly to collect them. In co-op, their value depends heavily on who can actually reach the drops when they appear.

special.description: When damaged, it can drop booster batteries that restore shield capacity when picked up.
